hero.description: Bridging the expert gap with multilingual voice AI that understands your soil, your weather, and your crops.
hero.dataDesc: Real-time analytics and precision tools for every acre, completely tailored to your local environment.
hero.harvestDesc: Watch your yield increase and costs decrease.

footer.mission: Rooted in intelligence. Growing the future of sustainable and profitable agriculture for everyone.

features.aiDesc: Take a photo of your leaf or crop. Our AI analyzes thousands of data points to identify issues instantly and suggest the exact cure.
features.dataDrivenDesc: Anaaj.ai connects with your local climate data and soil history to provide recommendations that actually work for your specific land.
features.recommendationText: Add organic compost next week to maintain nitrogen levels before the sowing cycle.

timeline.step1Desc: Speak or type your problem in your local language. No need to look up confusing scientific jargon.
timeline.step2Desc: The AI instantly processes the context. It analyzes your historical crop history, local weather forecasts, and satellite data to pinpoint the exact issue.
timeline.step3Desc: Receive actionable, clear steps to fix the problem. You will get exact chemical or organic dosages, timing suggestions based on the rain forecast, and immediate fixes.
timeline.step4Desc: Watch your yield increase safely. By avoiding broad-spectrum spraying and applying targeted fertilizer only when necessary, your costs decrease while plant health soars.

weather.alertTitle: Heavy rain expected in 4 hours. Avoid spraying fertilizer today.
weather.alertDesc: We’ve detected a high-probability storm cell. Save your inputs and wait for Wednesday morning for the best absorption window.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing.
pricing.desc: Choose a plan that fits your farm's scale. No hidden fees.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.a1: Yes, Anaaj.ai supports offline caching for weather and basic advisory tips. Voice interactions require a basic 2G connection for cloud processing.
faq.a2: Absolutely. We never sell farmer data to third parties. Your soil history is encrypted and used only to provide better advice to you.
faq.a3: We currently support Hindi, Gujarati, Punjabi, Marathi, Telugu, Tamil, and English. We are adding new languages every month.

appShowcase.title: The entire farm in your pocket.
appShowcase.subtitle: Voice-first design.
appShowcase.desc: We know you have your hands dirty. That's why every feature of Anaaj.ai is accessible via voice commands. Just double-tap anywhere to talk.

founders.label: The Visionaries
founders.title: Meet the Founders
founders.desc: Driven by a singular goal: to make expert agricultural knowledge accessible to every farmer in India.

prashant.desc: A strategic visionary with deep expertise in scaling digital ecosystems. Prashant leads the mission to bridge the gap between advanced AI and grassroots agriculture in India.

prakash.desc: With decades of experience in the agricultural sector, Mr. Prakash Chand Jain provides the foundational wisdom and strategic direction that roots Anaaj.ai in real-world farming needs.

prateek.desc: Prateek focuses on the intersection of hardware and software, ensuring that our AI solutions are perfectly optimized for the diverse technical landscape of rural India.

prashant_v.desc: Specializing in ground-level deployment, Prashant ensures that our technology reaches every corner of the field, managing complex logistics and farmer support networks.

map.title: Rooted in Punjab,
map.description: Our headquarters at the Agro-Tech Hub is the nerve center of Anaaj.ai, coordinating with thousands of local data nodes across the agricultural heartlands of India.

hero.description: We are building the first "Zero Literacy" agricultural operating system. A world where expertise doesn't require a degree, but simply a voice.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Bridging the
mission.p1: For decades, the latest in agronomy was locked behind complex interfaces and English-centric technology. Meanwhile, the 140 million farmers who feed India were left to navigate the climate crisis with fragmented information.
mission.quote: "At Anaaj AI, we believe translation isn't enough. Empowerment requires a platform that understands culture, dialect, and the weight of a seed."
mission.p2: Today, we provide instant, scientific crop advice through a platform that listens first. No typing in English, no complex dashboards—just spoken wisdom.

dna.title: Our DNA.
dna.description: The principles that guide every model we train and every village we enter.

impact.title: The Future is
impact.description: We aren't just predicting the harvest; we are empowering the harvester. By 2030, our goal is to support 50 million farmers across the Global South.

liveChat.description: Whether it's Hindi, Gujarati, or Punjabi, Anaaj.ai understands local dialects and context. Just speak naturally, and get instant answers.

section1.title: 1. Data Ownership
section1.text: At Anaaj.ai, we operate on a fundamental principle: <0>Your data belongs to you.</0> We do not sell your personal information or agricultural data to third-party marketers. Your soil history, crop data, and voice recordings are used solely to provide more accurate agricultural advice to you.

section2.title: 2. Information Collection
section2.text: We collect information necessary to provide our services, including:
items: Voice recordings (processed to understand your farming queries).
Satellite and GPS data (to provide localized weather and soil insights).
Crop health photos (used for pest and disease diagnosis).

section3.title: 3. Data Security
section3.text: We use industry-standard encryption protocols (SSL/TLS) to protect your data during transmission and storage. Access to your personal data is restricted to authorized Anaaj.ai personnel who require it to provide support and technical improvements.

section4.title: 4. Sharing Information
section4.text: We may share anonymous, aggregated data at a regional level (e.g., broad pest outbreak alerts) with government organizations to help prevent regional crop failures. This data is fully anonymized and cannot be linked back to individual farmers.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.text: You have the right to request a full copy of your data, or request the deletion of your account and all associated data at any time through our support portal or mobile app settings.

questions.title: Questions?
questions.text: If you have any questions regarding your privacy, please contact us at

organicroots.name: Organic Roots
organicroots.bio: Premium supplier of bio-fertilizers and organic compost based in Punjab. Ensuring healthy soil for generations.
organicroots.longBio: Organic Roots began with a simple mission: bringing sustainable soil health back to the heartland of India. We craft specialized bio-compost that restores essential microbes, boosting crop yields naturally without relying on harsh chemicals.

aerotech.name: AeroTech Drones
aerotech.bio: Specializing in high-precision agricultural drones for targeted spraying and crop monitoring.
aerotech.longBio: AeroTech bridges the gap between aerospace engineering and traditional farming. Our specialized drones enable hyper-targeted pesticide spraying and thermal field monitoring.

greenseed.name: GreenSeed Co.
greenseed.bio: Certified high-yield, drought-resistant seeds tailored for unpredictable weather patterns.
greenseed.longBio: Founded by agronomists deeply concerned with climate change, GreenSeed Co. offers hybrid seeds that require less water and exhibit higher resilience to sudden temperature changes.

agritechdev.name: AgriTech Solutions
agritechdev.bio: Pioneering smart agricultural development and sustainable farming hardware.
agritechdev.longBio: AgriTech Solutions is the premier provider of smart farm implements. From automated irrigation valves driven by IoT sensors to advanced soil tracking telemetry devices.

sunlightfarms.name: Sunlight Supply
sunlightfarms.bio: Industrial-grade greenhouse materials and hydroponic growth solutions.
sunlightfarms.longBio: Sunlight Supply enables year-round harvesting regardless of external weather conditions. We supply UV-resistant greenhouse film, structural poly-tunnels, and modular hydroponic nutrient reservoirs.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.text: By accessing or using the Anaaj.ai website or mobile application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all of these terms, do not use our services.

section2.title: 2. Nature of Advisory Service
section2.text: Anaaj.ai provides agricultural advice based on AI models, satellite data, and user input. While we strive for extreme accuracy, our advice is provided "as is". Agricultural outcomes depend on many factors beyond our control, including extreme weather and implementation methods. We are not liable for any crop results or financial losses.

section3.title: 3. User Responsibilities
section3.text: You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide (such as crop type and location). You agree to use the service only for lawful agricultural purposes and not to attempt to reverse engineer or disrupt the AI systems.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.text: All software, brand names, and logos associated with Anaaj.ai are the property of Anaaj.ai Precision Ltd. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use the service for personal or commercial agricultural use.

section5.title: 5. Termination
section5.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in fraudulent activities that threaten the integrity of our advisory models.

termsOfService.copyright: © 2026 Anaaj.ai Precision Ltd. All Rights Reserved.
